method: ORACLE-FIRST on real data — Claude (claude-opus-4-8) acting as the ideal Insight engine, labeling each top cluster's true membership / per-story angle / importance by reading title+summary BEFORE comparing to the pipeline. Anti-leakage: pipeline angle was hidden during oracle judgment; shown here only for the diff.
calibration: NONE — single uncalibrated LLM oracle. Numbers are INDICATIVE, not certified (no human kappa).
scope: top-10 pipeline clusters (21 stories); the user-visible Insight output.

clusters.event: TMC's Jahangir Khan withdraws from Falta re-poll
clusters.note: All 3 same event. HT 'cites CM promise, withdraws' is still a withdrawal REPORT (actor=candidate), not an authority statement → base_report, not official_response.

clusters.event: Rajnath Singh's Vietnam + South Korea tour
clusters.note: 'begins tour; BrahMos talks' is a trip report → base_report, not official_response.

clusters.event: US Russian-oil sanctions waiver (CONTRADICTORY: 'extends' vs 'allows to lapse')
clusters.note: FALSE MERGE: HT says the waiver is EXTENDED, BL says it LAPSES — related macro-event, different developments → related_not_same, should NOT be one cluster.

clusters.event: CBI arrest in NEET-UG paper leak
clusters.note: BL 'founder arrested' is a straight arrest report → base_report, not investigative_detail.

clusters.event: SEBI chief on markets absorbing West Asia crisis shocks
clusters.note: Both quote the SAME SEBI-chief statement → both official_response. Pipeline's market_reaction on the 2nd is wrong (no market move, just the official remark).
IMD warning = official_response acceptable; NDTV phrasing = base_report. Both fine.

clusters.event: Trump crypto venture & Iran exchange shared networks (investigation)
clusters.note: 'How X tapped into the same networks' is an investigation → investigative_detail. Pipeline's market_reaction is wrong.

clusters.event: Train fire in Bihar's Sasaram, no casualties
clusters.note: Straight incident report → base_report. Pipeline's reaction_public is wrong.

clusters.event: US DOJ drops fraud case against Gautam Adani
clusters.note: DOJ action; official_response acceptable on the HT framing, base_report on The Hindu.

clusters.event: Pakistan deploys troops/jets to Saudi amid Iran tensions
clusters.note: Military deployment report → base_report. Pipeline's market_reaction is wrong.
